name: Push Day Morning Flow
description: 10 min shoulder/chest opener before push day. Loosen thoracic spine, warm up rotator cuffs, get blood into chest and shoulders. Mat or floor only.

exercises.notes: Slow. Wake up the thoracic spine.
Small to big. Forward then backward.
Light band or no band — just squeeze shoulder blades. Opens up the chest.
Push hips high, press chest toward floor. Stretches shoulders and lats.
Easy reps. Slow descent, feel the stretch at the bottom. Blood flow, not fatigue.
Hang from bar or doorframe. Depress and retract scapulae. Activates the stabilizers.

tips: 10 min max — this is a primer, not a workout
If no band available, just do the pull-apart motion with arms extended
Focus on opening the chest and warming rotator cuffs
